TV Series.title: DARLING in the FRANXX
TV Series.overview: The distant future: Humanity established the mobile fort city, Plantation, upon the ruined wasteland. Within the city were pilot quarters, Mistilteinn, otherwise known as the “Birdcage.” That is where the children live... Their only mission in life was the fight. Their enemies are the mysterious giant organisms known as Kyoryu. The children operate robots known as FRANXX in order to face thes...

TV Series.title: The Haunted
TV Series.overview: Pet parents recount their animals' chilling experiences with ghosts, demons and other paranormal phenomena happening in their households.

TV Series.title: The Madison
TV Series.overview: Shattered by an unthinkable tragedy, the Clyburns uproot their comfortable lives in New York City and move to the wild, untamed beauty of rural Montana in search of connection.

TV Series.title: The Nanny
TV Series.overview: Comedienne Fran Drescher stars as the sweet and sassy Fran Fine in The Nanny. A down-on-her-luck diva gets a second chance at life (and love) when she unexpectedly becomes the new nanny to the children of a wealthy widower, Maxwell Sheffield.

TV Series.title: America's Culinary Cup
TV Series.overview: Created by Padma Lakshmi, AMERICA'S CULINARY CUP stars 16 of the country's most elite chefs competing in the ultimate culinary arena.

TV Series.title: Hoarders
TV Series.overview: This series delves into the mental disorder of hoarding, as experts work to help individuals overcome obsessive collecting and reclaim their lives.

TV Series.title: The Book Group
TV Series.overview: An American in Glasgow hopes to make friends by starting a book club, which succeeds in bringing an unexpected collection of people into her life.

TV Series.title: The Goes Wrong Show
TV Series.overview: Based on the `The Play That Goes Wrong', the internationally successful, award-winning Mischief Theatre brand. `The Goes Wrong Show' is written by and star the original founding Mischief Theatre members: Henry Lewis, Jonathan Sayer, and Henry Shields alongside Nancy Zamit, Charlie Russell, Bryony Corrigan, Greg Tannahill, Dave Hearn and Chris Leask. With their unique brand of physical theatre, the Mischief team perform six brand new, hand-crafted, half hours of theatrical catastrophe in front of a live studio audience.

TV Series.title: Date My Dad
TV Series.overview: IMDB 7.1 rating - Ricky Cooper had the perfect life. A former professional baseball player, who was married to Isabella, the love of his life. Ricky's world comes crashing down when Isabella passes away leaving him to raise three daughters alone.

TV Series.title: Primo
TV Series.overview: From Mike Schur, Executive Producer of Parks and Recreation & The Good Place, and creator Shea Serrano. Primo is a coming-of-age comedy about Rafa Gonzales, a wide-eyed teenager, being raised by his mother Drea and his five overbearing uncles (Rollie, Mike, Ryan, Jay, and Mondo) as he balances college aspirations, societal expectations, and a hectic home life on the south side of San Antonio.

TV Series.title: The Weakest Link
TV Series.overview: Romesh Ranganathan is in charge of the strategic big money game show. Can the contestants create a chain of answers and avoid the boot?

TV Series.title: Halt and Catch Fire
TV Series.overview: Set in the early 1980s, Halt and Catch Fire dramatizes the personal computing boom through the eyes of a visionary, an engineer and a prodigyIt’s March 1985. More than a year has passed since Joe MacMillan (Lee Pace) set fire to a truck full of Cardiff Giant PCs, the last in a long string of destructive acts that burned the people that made the machine possible: Gordon Clark (Scoot McNairy), Donna Clark (Kerry Bishé), Cameron Howe (Mackenzie Davis) and John Bosworth (Toby Huss). The Giant is about to go the way of the dinosaur, like any number of personal computers to enter the market in the wake of IBM. The lesson is harsh but clear: in history, only the truly disruptive ideas are destined to matter.

TV Series.title: Dispatches from Elsewhere
TV Series.overview: Four diverse strangers searching for meaning stumble into a mysterious game hidden in plain sight.

TV Series.title: Hap and Leonard
TV Series.overview: After hearing about a sunken treasure from his ex-wife, two unlikely best friends set out to find it, but their plan is a lot easier said than done.

TV Series.title: Fear the Walking Dead
TV Series.overview: Companion series to the show `The Walking Dead', this dramatic thriller focuses on new characters and storylines. Set in Los Angeles, the show explores the very beginning of the plague that led to the zombie apocalypse depicted in `The Walking Dead'.

TV Series.title: TURN: Washington's Spies
TV Series.overview: A young farmer joins a group of childhood friends to form a spy network charged with sniffing out British military strategy and helping turn the tide of the American Revolution.

TV Series.title: Chasing the Rains
TV Series.overview: Track three wild matriarchs on the hunt for life-giving water during one of Kenya’s worst droughts. Trek alongside the Royals elephant clan, see wild dog Phoenix fend off wily hyenas, and watch cheetah Kuleta keep her cubs out of predators’ reach.

TV Series.title: Documentary Now!
TV Series.overview: Starring Fred Armisen (Portlandia) and Bill Hader (Barry), the Emmy Nominated Documentary Now! parodies the current obsession with documentaries featuring six different stories and stylistic approaches paying tribute to the doc format. Created by Seth Meyers (Late Night with Seth Meyers), Bill Hader and Fred Armisen.

TV Series.title: SisterS
TV Series.overview: Two women, one from Canada and the other from Ireland, discover they are half-sisters and embark on a road trip to find their alcoholic father, a trip that becomes a vessel for self-discovery filled with the macabre humour that can come with trauma.

TV Series.title: The Creep Tapes
TV Series.overview: The Creep Tapes is a collection of video tapes from the secret vault of the world's deadliest and most socially uncomfortable serial killer.

TV Series.title: Preacher
TV Series.overview: As our story inches closer to the finale, God's endgame for the universe begins to click into place. Trapped between heavenly prophecies, hellish prisons, and all-out nuclear war, Jesse, Tulip, and Cassidy make their bloody way to the Most High. Whether they can reach God in time — or whether all this carnage is part of His divine plan — will soon be revealed as Preacher barrels towards the end..

TV Series.title: Z Nation
TV Series.overview: Un equipo de héroes cotidianos debe transportar al único sobreviviente conocido del virus zombi al último laboratorio viral en funcionamiento.

TV Series.title: Parish
TV Series.overview: Haunted by the violent murder of his son, Gray Parish (Giancarlo Esposito, "Breaking Bad") finds himself thrust into an adrenaline-charged thrill ride through the criminal underworld. With no escape, the wrong way may be his only way out.

TV Series.title: Hell Motel
TV Series.overview: Hell Motel sees a group of 10 true crime obsessives invited to the opening of the newly renovated Cold River Motel, the site of a satanic mass murder. History repeats itself when the guests get stranded and start getting knocked off one by one.

TV Series.title: Horror's Greatest
TV Series.overview: Masters of horror celebrate the best of the genre: the essential giant monsters and must-see Stephen King adaptations, wildest Japanese horror films and funniest horror comedies--plus a deep-dive into films that embrace and subvert tropes & clichés.

TV Series.title: Manhattan
TV Series.overview: In 1943, a group of scientists arrive at a top-secret lab in Los Alamos, New Mexico for a fateful mission: to build the world’s first atomic bomb.

TV Series.title: Riviera
TV Series.overview: Riviera's highly anticipated return picks up in the immediate aftermath of the explosive first series finale, where the Clios family is faced with the tragic death of one of their own. Only this time, the blood is on the hands of our female protagonist, Georgina.

TV Series.title: The Walking Dead: World Beyond
TV Series.overview: Season two of The Walking Dead: World Beyond concludes the epic story of Iris, Hope, Elton, and Silas. As they face off against the mysterious Civic Republic Military, goals shift, bonds form and crumble, and innocence is both lost and found.

TV Series.title: The Secrets She Keeps
TV Series.overview: Two women have a chance encounter in a supermarket in an affluent Sydney suburb. They are the same age, both heavily pregnant and due at the same time. Meghan is an online influencer on the rise. Agatha works in the supermarket as a shelf stacker.

TV Series.title: Hemlock Grove
TV Series.overview: From executive producer Eli Roth (Hostel, Cabin Fever) comes the darkly poetic, moving and terrifying hit US series Hemlock Grove. Set deep in the heart of Pennsylvania, a gruesome murder sends shockwaves through the eccentric residents of the mysterious suburb.

TV Series.title: Los artistas: Primeros trazos
TV Series.overview: Cata, una experta en arte originaria de México, se encuentra en un bache personal y profesional. Por casualidad conoce a Yago, quien les vende baratijas a coleccionistas inexpertos.

TV Series.title: Island
TV Series.overview: Evil took its first step to destroy the world. On the mysterious island of Jeju Island, the gateway to this, "Van," a mix of human and monster, "Won Mi-ho," the one in the center of fate, and "Johan," the one who exercises God’s power, come together. A strange, yet captivating, action-packed exorcism fantasy in which they fight evil, share the fate of saving the world, and defy their own...

TV Series.title: She Walks Alone
TV Series.overview: Carla, maestra de preparatoria, investiga si las acusaciones de acoso contra Ricardo, su colega y amigo, son mentiras de Daniela, una alumna problema. La situación revive viejos traumas que creía olvidados. La justicia en el presente sanará su pasado.

TV Series.title: Lucha de Antojos
TV Series.overview: Ocho chefs de Ciudad de México compiten en la calle, para enfrentarse a los titanes de la comida callejera por el mejor antojo. Pelean el título de Lucha de antojos.

TV Series.title: Cualquier Parecido
TV Series.overview: En una entrega de premios, Carlota se reencuentra con JJ, su esposo, después de 6 meses de no verse. Ella intenta hablar con él para salvar el matrimonio y en vez de lograrlo, precipita el final.

TV Series.title: Un buen divorcio
TV Series.overview: Los abogados de divorcio Mónica y David viven su propio colapso matrimonial tras fuertes complicaciones en un caso y la revelación de una boda sorpresa. Mónica defiende a su cliente descubriendo oscuros secretos y David tiene un desliz inesperado.

TV Series.title: Wendy, perdida pero famosa
TV Series.overview: En una nueva realidad, Wendy descubre el impacto de su participación en el programa. Ahora ella es la estrella y, como tal, debe hacer cosas de estrellas: dar entrevistas, firmas de autógrafos, huir de la prensa, conflicto con Marlon y regrear a León.

TV Series.title: Y llegaron de noche
TV Series.overview: Esta hilarante historia protagonizada por Eugenio Derbez cuenta cómo un grupo de extravagantes Latinos grabó de noche, y con escasos recursos, la versión de ‘Drácula’ en español, qué contra todo pronóstico fue más exitosa que la versión en inglés.

TV Series.title: El Gallo de Oro
TV Series.overview: El amor y la suerte se cruzan entre La Caponera, una cantante de palenques con el don de dar fortuna, un hacendado adicto al juego y un tímido pregonero con sueños de ser gallero. Con el azar de por medio ¿podrá encontrar ella su verdadero amor?

TV Series.title: Juegos interrumpidos
TV Series.overview: Una madre se entera que dieron en adopción a su hijo, de origen mexicano, por medio de una red de trata de personas. Ella emprenderá un viaje para buscar respuestas, pero su misión implica peligros, que pondrán en riesgo la vida de los involucrados.

TV Series.title: Consuelo
TV Series.overview: En los mojigatos años 50´s, Consuelo es una mujer que tiene la vida perfecta de un ama de casa de clase alta. Todo cambiará en el momento en que su marido la deje y deba entrar en un vibrante y prohibido negocio para mantener a su familia.

TV Series.title: Solo para Mujeres
TV Series.overview: Esta es la historia de Solo para Mujeres; desde los inicios de Sergio Mayer y Alexis Ayala en el star system mexicano de los 90 hasta el impacto cultural del show en la sociedad, la sexualidad en la cultura popular y las luchas de sus protagonistas.

TV Series.title: LeBaron Muerte en la Tierra Prometida
TV Series.overview: En Bavispe, Sonora, tres mujeres mormonas, méxico-americanas, y sus hijos, fueron masacrados. Éste hecho se convirtió en escándalo internacional. ¿Quiénes eran estas víctimas y por qué las asesinaron? ¿Fue un ataque contra los LeBaron?

TV Series.title: Se llamaba Pedro Infante
TV Series.overview: A bordo de un viejo avión, Pedro Infante y el Capitán Vidal, pelean con los mandos, ya que van en picada. La mirada de angustia de Pedro nos lleva al día anterior. Pedro acuerda con María Luisa terminar con la demanda por bigamia.

TV Series.title: Profe Infiltrado
TV Series.overview: Julián, un tipo bonachón que trabaja como repartidor de electrodomésticos robados, es capturado por la policía y obligado a infiltrarse como profesor de deportes en el Instituto Cuévano, la preparatoria privada en donde estudia la hija de su jefe.

TV Series.title: Paraíso blanco
TV Series.overview: La bio serie de Carlos Lehder, después de pasar 30 años en la cárcel regresa a Alemania con su hija Julie, recordando todo lo que dejó atrás.

TV Series.title: Isla Brava
TV Series.overview: La misma noche que Lucía confiesa a su marido Alfredo, dueño de un lujo resort, que está enamorada de Bruno, él desaparece misteriosamente. La búsqueda de Alfredo revelará un perverso secreto familiar.

TV Series.title: Cómplices
TV Series.overview: María José, Paula, Roberta y Stacy, conductoras de un talk show, quedan impactadas por la muerte del hombre que las atormentó. Acusadas de un asesinato que niegan, se unen y abrazan la vida, enfrentando tragedias personales con humor negro.

TV Series.title: Al Chile
TV Series.overview: 'El Vítor' explora el alma picante de México, con humor y picardía. Más que un simple ingrediente, el chile es identidad. Entre risas y sabores, 'Al chile' es una declaración de amor al picor, que enciende el plato y el corazón.

TV Series.title: El extraño retorno de Diana Salazar
TV Series.overview: Por sus pesadillas Diana busca apoyo en su psicólogo Joaquín, pero la llegada de Mario a CDMX desencadena una serie de eventos sobrenaturales. Juntos vivirán una gran historia de amor que sobrepasa épocas y vidas.

TV Series.title: Papá Soltero
TV Series.overview: César, perdido tras la muerte de Sandra, recibe la visita inesperada de María, su otra hija. Cesár Intenta controlar la situación llenando la casa de becarios, pero todo se vuelve un caos, al punto de perder a su hijo Cesarín.

TV Series.title: LaLola
TV Series.overview: Romina, en medio del despecho, acude con una bruja, Circe, para vengarse de su novio. Acto seguido, Lalo, despierta en el cuerpo de una mujer y en medio del desconcierto se hace llamar Lola, teniendo que adaptarse y pidiendo ayuda a Alexa.

TV Series.title: Camino a Arcadia
TV Series.overview: Bajo una identidad falsa, Pablo y su hijo se refugian en Arcadia. Su pasado regresa para destruirlo todo; viejos enemigos, traiciones y un amor perdido, pero para proteger a su familia, deberá enfrentarse a su mayor miedo, convertirse en quien fue.

TV Series.title: Par de ideotas
TV Series.overview: Vadhir y José Eduardo Derbez prueban suerte abriendo un antro por dos semanas, le quieren demostrar a su padre y a ellos mismos que pueden hacer algo exitoso, pero descubren en el proceso que tiene un vínculo especial.

TV Series.title: Con esa misma mirada
TV Series.overview: Eloísa está sumergida creando un cuadro para su esposo Octavio, él lleva manteniendo una relación secreta con Gabriela desde hace dos años. Eloísa conoce a Pablo, periodista en medio de un divorcio. Eloísa enfrenta la realidad de su matrimonio.

TV Series.title: Riquísimos... Por Cierto
TV Series.overview: Los López Pérez reciben la noticia de que su tío Fidel, el cacique de Angangueo, ha fallecido y les ha dejado su fortuna. ¡Ahora son inmensamente ricos! Y como tal, necesitan la mejor servidumbre. ¿Qué no harán ahora que son ricos?

TV Series.title: El dentista
TV Series.overview: Una serie de asesinatos de mujeres en Veracruz en el año 1889 son investigados por la policía local con la ayuda de Eduardo Nolasco Black, dentista y pionero en la investigación forense, de la mano de Sofía, una química de la alta sociedad.

TV Series.title: De viaje con los Derbez
TV Series.overview: Eugenio convinces his reluctant family to take a vacation together for the first time ever. Despite their busy schedules, they drop what they’re doing to join him for a month in Morocco where they embark on a crazy, emotional and hilarious adventure.

TV Series.title: Mujeres Asesinas
TV Series.overview: Las protagonistas de esta serie tienen varios elementos en común. Sus vidas no fueron sencillas ni serenas ni felices. Lidiaron con parejas violentas, padres o madres manipuladores, jefes hostiles, situaciones de humillación, historias de venganza.

TV Series.title: Oríllese a la Orilla
TV Series.overview: En esta ocasión Brayan es señalado por los vecinos de ser cómplice de delincuentes. Toña, le sugiere que se haga policía y Brayan la anima también a ella, se imagina deteniendo a una banda y siendo heroína de la historia.

TV Series.title: Nunca tuvo miedo
TV Series.overview: Chalino enfrentó dificultades a lo largo de su vida en Sinaloa, por lo que decidió ir a Estados Unidos en búsqueda de mejores oportunidades. Es allí donde comenzó a escribir sus primeras canciones, que marcaron el inicio de su carrera.

TV Series.title: Deal or No Deal
TV Series.overview: This exciting game show has contestants play for a highly coveted cash prize in a tournament which requires nerve, talent, and a bit of luck.

TV Series.title: Molly of Denali
TV Series.overview: The daily adventures of 10-year-old Alaska native Molly Mabray, her family, her dog Suki and her friends Tooey and Trini.

TV Series.title: Chihayafuru
TV Series.overview: Chihaya Ayase has spent most of her life supporting her sister’s model career. When she meets a boy named Arata Wataya, he thinks Chihaya has potential to become a great karuta player. As Chihaya dreams of becoming Japan's best karuta player, she is soon separated from her karuta playing friends. Now in high school, Chihaya still plays karuta in the hope that she will one day meet her frien...

TV Series.title: Senryu Girl
TV Series.overview: Yukishiro Nanako may seem like a normal girl, but she expresses herself only through written senryu poetry! This means she communicates in 5-7-5 syllables as she and her ex-delinquent bestie, Busujima Eiji, run their high school’s Literature Club.

TV Series.title: After the Rain
TV Series.overview: Akira Tachibana was a track star, but an injury forced her to quit the team. Masami Kondo wanted to be a writer but now manages a restaurant. When Akira takes a job at Masami's business, they begin to reconsider everything about themselves.

TV Series.title: GODANNAR!!
TV Series.overview: Goh's and Anna's wedding is interrupted by aliens. As Goh struggles in battle against them, Anna s uses a robot to save him. They become the mighty robot "Godannar," making this husband and wife duo the strongest opponent the aliens have faced!

TV Series.title: Mezzo DSA
TV Series.overview: In the near future, Androids and high tech gadgets are commonplace. Whether it's serving as a bodyguard, securing biological weapons, or uncovering massive scandals, Suzuki Mikura, Kurokawa Kenichi, and Harada Tomohisa are always on the case.

TV Series.title: Fate/kaleid liner Prisma Illya
TV Series.overview: Illya (Illyasviel von Einzbern) is a typical young girl attending Homurabara Academy who just happens to have a slight crush on her brother-in-law. Then, one night, a magic wand called Magical Ruby falls from the sky into her bath and tricks her into signing a contract...

TV Series.title: RahXephon
TV Series.overview: Ayato's life changes forever when he learns that only he can pilot a super weapon known as RahXephon.

TV Series.title: Beyond the Boundary
TV Series.overview: In this new observational documentary series cricketer Pete Trego will be travelling around the world to meet passionate players and supporters of the game.

TV Series.title: Mayo Chiki!
TV Series.overview: Have you heard the one about The Cross-Dressing Butler, the Female Wrestlers, the Chicken AND the Principal’s daughter? Sakamachi Kinjiro suffers from acute gynophobia, but his female troubles don’t redline until a wrong turn exposes Subaru’s secret; if her cross-dressing isn’t enough of a drag, Kinjiro’s girl problems also include a martial artist, a fetishist, AND his own sister! The freak flags fly, the punch lines aim low, and the butler is cross-dressed to kill in Mayo Chiki!

TV Series.title: Fate/stay night
TV Series.overview: A young amateur magician unknowingly enters a tournament that is fought to the death.

TV Series.title: Maid Sama!
TV Series.overview: Misaki is class president of a formerly all-male school. A beacon of hope to the female students as well as teachers, she rules over the boys with an iron fist and a heart of ice. A popular male student stumbles on to her secret double life- working part-time as an upbeat and cheery waitress at a maid cafe! Misaki is forced to make a deal: spend some time with him, or have her hard earned reputation destroyed by revealing her embarrassing secret.

TV Series.title: Monster Musume: Everyday Life with Monster Girls
TV Series.overview: When Kimihito finds himself sucked into a government exchange program he soon develops a monster problem: monster girls!

TV Series.title: Teen Mom 2
TV Series.overview: `Teen Mom 2' follows four girls from the second season of MTV's documentary series `16 and Pregnant' as they face the challenges of their first years of motherhood. Chelsea, Jenelle, Kailyn and Leah are seen trying to come to grips with the myriad of responsibilities that caring for a child brings, and doing so while worrying about such things as finances, living arrangements, graduating from high school, family support (or lack thereof) and the role of their baby's father.

TV Series.title: Killing Eve
TV Series.overview: In this series that topples the typical spy-action thriller, two fiercely intelligent women go head to head in an epic game of cat and mouse.

TV Series.title: Rob Dyrdek's Fantasy Factory
TV Series.overview: Rob is no longer lounging at his familiar house in the Hills. Instead he's commanding operations in a massive industrial, and fully skate-able, warehouse and office complex. Visit Rob Dyrdek's Fantasy Factory, where strange and wonderful dreams come true.

TV Series.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
TV Series.overview: The world is divided into four nations -- the Water Tribe, the Earth Kingdom, the Fire Nation and and the Air Nomads -- each represented by a natural element for which the nation is named. Benders have the ability to control and manipulate the element from their nation. Only the Avatar is the master of all four elements. The ruthless Fire Nation wants to conquer the world but the only bender who has enough power, the Avatar, has disappeared... until now. His tribe soon discovers that Aang is the long-lost Avatar. Now Katara and Sokka must safeguard Aang on his journey to master all four elements and save the world from the Fire Nation.

TV Series.title: Degrassi
TV Series.overview: Degrassi: The Next Generation is a pull-no-punches dramatic series that tackles the real-life issues of high school students.

TV Series.title: Pretty Hard Cases
TV Series.overview: "Pretty Hard Cases" follows Guns and Gangs detective Sam and Drug Squad detective Kelly. By day, they are heroes in their particular way: skilled, tough, determined, and entertaining, fighting to do good in a broken system.

TV Series.title: The Librarians
TV Series.overview: Far deep under the Metropolitan Public Library in New York, Flynn Carsen, a magical librarian who keeps ancient treasures safe in secret, is facing a fear of an evil society. NATO Colonel Eve Baird is invited to join the Library as a guardian, but her original team menber are too unique to fight with... To save the world, a great adventure begins!

TV Series.title: Sailor Moon
TV Series.overview: Usagi Tsukino is a cheerful 14-year-old schoolgirl who often finds herself in unwanted trouble. One day, she saves a talking cat named Luna, and her life is changed forever.

TV Series.title: Sledge Hammer!
TV Series.overview: The adventures of a deranged police detective who always looks for the most violent solution to any problem.

TV Series.title: Play-Doh Squished
TV Series.overview: PLAY-DOH SQUISHED features three teams of fun-loving adults and kids going ‘doh-to-doh’ in the ultimate Holiday Competition. The groups compete in two physical challenges that culminate in a sculpting event where they must build immersive Winter Wonderlands out of Play-Doh! In the end, only one team will win a grand prize, while the other teams’ creations will get SQUISHED! Sarah Hyland hosts.

TV Series.title: Pokémon
TV Series.overview: Ash and Pikachu are off to the distant Unova region where they'll encounter new friends, new rivals, new challenges, and all-new Pokémon!

TV Series.title: Highlander: The Raven
TV Series.overview: Conflicted Amanda Darieux (Elizabeth Gracen) is a 1,200-year-old immortal thief who joins forces with retired security specialist Nick Wolfe (Paul Johansson) to dispose of crooked immortals in this spin-off from the popular Highlander television series

TV Series.title: Gary and His Demons
TV Series.overview: Un chasseur de démons a du mal à rester intéressé par la responsabilité de sauver la Terre, qu'il n'a jamais demandée.

TV Series.title: Alex Rider
TV Series.overview: Alex Rider is an ordinary teenager enlisted to work on behalf of MI6, where he uses skills he didn't know he had to become an extraordinary spy.

TV Series.title: The Enfield Haunting
TV Series.overview: In 1977 London, a family finds their home beginning to show signs of poltergeist activity and must rely on the help of experts in the field.

TV Series.title: Collision
TV Series.overview: A devastating road accident has forever changed the lives of those involved, but as an ongoing investigation reveals: it goes so much deeper.

TV Series.title: Bancroft
TV Series.overview: Centers around Detective Superintendent Elizabeth Bancroft, who is forced to confront her demons when a case from her past is reopened.

TV Series.title: Taboo
TV Series.overview: An adventurer returns to London to bury his father and claim his inheritance—a small piece of land that the East India Company is willing to kill for.

TV Series.title: Ascension
TV Series.overview: Back in 1963, the U.S. government sent hundreds of citizens on a century-long voyage to a new world. Fifty years later, chaos breaks out on the ship.

TV Series.title: The Prisoner
TV Series.overview: After he resigns from his job, a secret agent is abducted and taken to what looks like an ideal village, except it is really a bizarre prison .

TV Series.title: Solos
TV Series.overview: Solos is a seven-part anthology series that explores the strange, beautiful, heart-breaking, hilarious, wondrous truths of what it means to be human. Performed by eight of the finest actors of our time, this anthology series spans our present and future and illuminates that even during our most isolated moments we are all connected through the human experience.

TV Series.title: Lost in Austen
TV Series.overview: A modern London woman obsessed with the romance in Jane Austen’s work discovers that she’s switched lives with a character from Pride & Prejudice.

TV Series.title: Vagrant Queen
TV Series.overview: Now an orphaned outcast, former child queen Elida flees Lazaro's army with her friends and sets off on a dangerous adventure through the galaxy.

TV Series.title: Space: 1999
TV Series.overview: The crew of Moonbase Alpha must struggle to survive when the force from a massive explosion throws the moon out of orbit and into deep space.

TV Series.title: The Dead Zone
TV Series.overview: After suffering a tragic car accident, a young man awakens from a coma with extraordinary psychic powers. Based on the Stephen King novel.

TV Series.title: The Center Seat: 55 Years of Star Trek
TV Series.overview: A 55-year voyage back to the beginning for a behind-the-scenes glimpse inside the USS Enterprise and one of greatest landmark series of all time.

TV Series.title: Murdertown
TV Series.overview: Emilia Fox explores ten chilling cases across the UK, uncovering the crimes that shook local communities and shocked the nation.

TV Series.title: Moses Jones
TV Series.overview: When a mutilated dead body is discovered in the Thames, Moses Jones is put on the case by his superiors at Scotland Yard, simply because of his ethnic heritage. Paired with DS Dan Twentyman the two are at a loss as to whether to put the mysterious death down to ritualistic murder, terrorism, organized crime or the work of a lunatic.

TV Series.title: Masterminds
TV Series.overview: Get an insider’s look into how real-life crimes were pulled off: from bank robberies and great escapes, to impersonations and fraud.

TV Series.title: The City and the City
TV Series.overview: Inspector Tyador Borlú of the Extreme Crime Squad in the European city-state of Beszel, investigates the murder of a student from Beszel's twin-city of Ul Qoman. Based on the award winning novel "The City and the City" by China Miéville.

TV Series.title: Mayday
TV Series.overview: A small town's Mayday festival turns to panic when its newly crowned May Queen vanishes, revealing the sinister secrets lurking beneath the surface.

TV Series.title: Screw
TV Series.overview: A drama exploring an all-male British prison like no one has ever seen before: through the embattled, inspiring characters who work there.

TV Series.title: Cambridge Spies
TV Series.overview: Four Cambridge University students are plunged into a world of lies and deception when they are recruited as double agents for the Soviet Union.

TV Series.title: Occupied
TV Series.overview: From a storyline conceived by bestselling author Jo Nesbø, `Occupied' focuses on political and environmental issues affecting Scandinavia. The ten-part Nordic drama is based in the near future, when environmental concerns prompt the Norwegian government to stop all oil and gas production in the North Sea. With limited resources available elsewhere, these actions result in a world crisis. Stepping in on behalf of the EU, Russia invades the country with the sole aim to complete a "silk-glove" operation, which involves taking control of the oil supplies. However, as the mission gets underway, further political conflicts take over the nation.

TV Series.title: Spy High
TV Series.overview: When teenager Blake Robbins files a lawsuit claiming his school is spying on him, it sparks a wild scandal with alarming digital privacy implications.

TV Series.title: Crime Files the Homefront
TV Series.overview: Delve into the mind of a killer and discover the truth behind some of the most notoriously criminal cases in history. 4 episodes include infamous murders Stacy Castor, the Menendez brothers, Drew Peterson and more.

TV Series.title: Second Sight
TV Series.overview: Ross Tanner, a maverick ambitious Detective Chief Inspector who gets results by always going that extra mile is a man with a terrible secret. Detective Inspector Catherine Tully, a competitive graduate officer is drafted into Tanner's serious crime unit to help investigate the apparently motiveless, brutal murder of a nineteen year-old boy.

TV Series.title: Decoy
TV Series.overview: Based on a NYC undercover policewoman’s real case histories, her inner world of suspicion, fear, and living with hard choices unfolds with each tale.

TV Series.title: Silent Witness
TV Series.overview: The multi-award-winning crime drama returns with five more gripping stories for the team of scientists to solve. Led by pathologist Dr Nikki Alexander and forensic scientist Jack Hodgson, no case is ever the same for the investigators.

TV Series.title: An Unknown Enemy
TV Series.overview: Fernando Barrientos, Head of the National Security Directorate, Mexico's Secret Police, is trying to reach the highest position in the country. On his way, he'll have to manipulate, betray, and kill, and he's well prepared for it. However, his path will be full of obstacles. Nobody, not even his family, will be immune to the chaos left in his quest for total power.

TV Series.title: Tin Star
TV Series.overview: After being left destroyed by the chaos that had followed Jim and his alcoholic alter ego Jack Devlin, Tin Star Season 2 picks up with the unlikely hero cut off in the remote Rockies wilderness with his grieving and shell-shocked family struggling to come to terms with their ordeal.

TV Series.title: Rebecka Martinsson
TV Series.overview: When a close friend from her childhood suddenly passes away Rebecka reluctantly returns to Kiruna, the place where she grew up. It soon turns out that not everything is as it appears to be. The questions pile up when she discovers that her friend was actually murdered and Rebecka cant leave until she has found some answers.

TV Series.title: Deadly Women
TV Series.overview: Former FBI criminal profiler Candice DeLong explores the stories of female murderers and the psychological motivations that drove them to kill.

TV Series.title: ReGenesis
TV Series.overview: Geneticist David Sandstrom is the chief scientist at the prestigious North American Biotechnology Advisory Commission. The virology/micro-biology NorBAC laboratory is a joint enterprise between the USA, Canada and Mexico that investigates problems of a scientific nature, such as bio-terrorism, mysterious disease and radical environmental changes.

TV Series.title: The Sandbaggers
TV Series.overview: Taut Cold War-era spy series following the Sandbaggers, an elite British Intelligence team taking on anything from assassinations to aiding defectors.

TV Series.title: Route 66
TV Series.overview: The adventures of two young drifters across America on Highway Route 66.

TV Series.title: Viewpoint
TV Series.overview: DC Martin Young, a surveillance detective, sets up his observation post in the home of a single mother when a primary school teacher goes missing.

TV Series.title: The Consultant
TV Series.overview: After an unspeakable tragedy at CompWare, a games studio based in downtown Los Angeles, a mysterious consultant, Regus Patoff, blows into town and takes charge.

TV Series.title: Without Motive
TV Series.overview: A headstrong cop tries to balance a dead-end serial killer investigation with a panicked public, a shade-throwing press and a crumbling marriage.

TV Series.title: Wire in the Blood
TV Series.overview: A clinical psychologist joins forces with the Bradfield police department to help track down brutal serial killers and bring them to justice.

TV Series.title: The Trial: A Murder in the Family
TV Series.overview: The Trial: A Murder in the Family is a British television docudrama, produced by Dragonfly Film and television, that first broadcast on Channel 4 on 21 May 2017. The five-part series follows a fictional court case in which university lecturer Simon Davis is tried for the murder of his wife Carla, in an attempt to recreate an accurate portrayal of an English legal trial.

TV Series.title: And Never Let Her Go
TV Series.overview: In this miniseries based on a true story, a passionate affair between a government aide and an attorney evolves into a dangerous obsession and murder.

TV Series.title: Bäckström
TV Series.overview: Evert Bäckström is a rock star among cops and a genius at solving crimes; a woman's skull is found, and Bäckström sees a case only he can solve.

TV Series.title: Whitechapel
TV Series.overview: Modern Whitechapel is experiencing déjà vu with a series of murders that exactly copy those of perpetrated by Jack the Ripper. Can Detective Chandler, a rookie when it comes to murder cases, bring safety back to the streets of Whitechapel?

TV Series.title: Halifax f.p.
TV Series.overview: Jane Halifax is a freelance forensic psychiatrist (f.p.) a psychological super-sleuth immersed in a mire of crime and punishment: Jane is an expert of the human mind.

TV Series.title: Utopia
TV Series.overview: Utopia is a conspiracy thriller that follows a group of young fans who come together when they discover that the conspiracy in an elusive comic, Utopia, is real. The comic foretells the demise of humanity and the world as we know it, thrusting this group of underdogs to embark on a high-stakes twisted adventure to use what they uncover to save themselves, each other and ultimately humanity.

TV Series.title: Clean Break
TV Series.overview: When a kidnapping goes horribly awry, the ensuing backlash leaves a drastic and catastrophic effect on the entire community of Wexford.

TV Series.title: Unsolved Mysteries
TV Series.overview: Re-enactments, interviews, and updates   clues and answers to real mysteries, from unsolved crimes to missing people and paranormal events.

TV Series.title: The Gulf
TV Series.overview: In this gripping psychological mystery from New Zealand, Detective Jess Savage (Kate Elliott, Wentworth) is recovering from a car crash that killed her husband when she learns about a new lead in a cold case. Jess restarts the investigation but notices troubling lapses in her memory. As she searches for answers, she begins to fathom that justice isn't always right, and not all crimes are wrong.

TV Series.title: Archangel
TV Series.overview: A British professor of Soviet history attends a conference in Moscow, where he becomes embroiled in a series of mysteries surrounding Joseph Stalin.

TV Series.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: The Ridge
TV Series.overview: With insight from Sasquatch experts, this series closely examines the investigation of the Chestnut Ridge area of Pennsylvania.

TV Series.title: Fireball XL5
TV Series.overview: In the year 2062 the World Space Patrol watches the skies with its fleet of spacecraft.

TV Series.title: 100 Years of Horror
TV Series.overview: Hosted by Christopher Lee, this program chronicles the history of horror from the earliest chillers and creature features to the modern era of horror.

TV Series.title: The Island
TV Series.overview: After a deadly virus takes down a small community living on an island in the North Sea, the few survivors left must fight for their lives.

TV Series.title: Kamen Rider
TV Series.overview: A motorcycle-riding cyborg fights the evil organization that transformed him for their evil deeds.

TV Series.title: Purgatory
TV Series.overview: A group of strangers gather at an exclusive winter resort in the mountains to ring in the New Year, but not every member of the party is there to celebrate. One of them is looking for revenge.

TV Series.title: Bedlam
TV Series.overview: Residents of an apartment building converted from a pre-Victorian psychiatric asylum start to experience supernatural happenings.

TV Series.title: Hammer House of Horror
TV Series.overview: Terror awaits in this anthology series from Britain's famed Hammer studios, featuring stories of haunted houses, demons and other macabre delights.

TV Series.title: The Returned
TV Series.overview: In a French Alpine village, a random group of people realize they’ve been dead for several years. Soon, devastating secrets emerge.

TV Series.title: Todd and the Book of Pure Evil
TV Series.overview: A stoner metalhead named Todd Smith, his crushee Jenny, his best friend Curtis, and the geeky Hannah, search their high school for a mayhem-causing Satanic spell book, while being opposed by Atticus, the evil guidance councillor.

TV Series.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: True Crime
TV Series.overview: A humourous take on unsolved crimes, hauntings, and historical mysteries, as a conspiracy theorist tries to convince his sceptical friend that evidence isn't always what it appears to be.

Movies.title: Diary of a Tired Black Man
Movies.overview: Thought-provoking, comedic battle of the sexes centers this story of a successful Black man navigating tense dating relationships after his divorce.

Movies.title: Mo' Money
Movies.overview: A con artist strives to go straight by working in the mailroom of a credit card company, until he needs more cash to woo a rising executive assistant

Movies.title: School Daze
Movies.overview: Innovative filmmaker Spike Lee (She's Gotta Have It) brings to the screen a music-filled, offbeat contemporary comedy that takes an unforgettable look at black college life.

Movies.title: Barbershop: The Next Cut
Movies.overview: It's been more than 10 years since our last appointment at Calvin's Barbershop. Ice Cube, Cedric the Entertainer and the whole crew are back together for a quick trim, some good conversation, a little gossip...and to save their neighborhood!

Movies.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business
Movies.overview: HD. A neighborhood barbershop is threatened by a greedy developer who opens a flashy, upscale salon right across the street!

Movies.title: Underclassman
Movies.overview: A young detective working undercover at an elite private school discovers the students are operating an international stolen car ring.

Movies.title: Soul Plane
Movies.overview: After a humiliating experience on an airplane, a man is awarded a huge settlement and uses the funds to create the full service airline of his dreams.

Movies.title: Barbershop
Movies.overview: HD. An eventful day in the life of a barbershop on Chicago's south side is the setting for this hit comedy..

Movies.title: Dance Flick
Movies.overview: When a naive girl meets a troublemaking street dancer at school, they immediately grow close and perfect their moves with the hopes of facing the school's reigning queen of dance battles.

Movies.title: Rebel in the Rye
Movies.overview: Nicholas Hoult stars in the tale of the literary genius behind the masterpiece Catcher in the Rye and the mentor who helped change American culture forever.

Movies.title: In a Relationship
Movies.overview: Over the course of a summer in LA, steadfast couple Owen and Hallie stare down the end of their relationship while Matt and Willa are just beginning.

Movies.title: Kase-san and Morning Glories
Movies.overview: Soon after meeting, Yamada and Kase began to date! But dating isn’t as easy as it looks, and they must weather the storms all couples eventually face. Will their relationship continue to bloom as college entrance exams threaten to keep them apart?

Movies.title: Becoming Evil: Serial Killers of the Old West
Movies.overview: American serial killers are hardly a phenomenon confined to the 20th and 21st centuries. The Old West was a well-known time of violent lawlessness.

Movies.title: Roger
Movies.overview: The lively adventures of a little girl, the carefree, joyful and occasionally perky Fatou, and an alien, the clumsy Roger, on a tropical island... Throughout their adventures, they trigger small accidents that sometimes grow into major disasters, but (almost) always end on a happy note. In short, Roger and Fatou spend their time saving the island from their own mistakes and blunders.

Movies.title: L.O.L. Surprise! Winter Disco
Movies.overview: After being stuck in a snowstorm, a young woman tells the tale of a group of toy friends venturing out to attend the coolest party in the land.

Movies.title: The Snowy Day
Movies.overview: Based on the award-winning book by Ezra Jack Keats. Peter sets out on a magical walk to help his Nana with the Mac'N'cheese for their traditional Christmas Eve dinner. Along the way he marvels at the wonders of a snowy day and a friend helps him build a snowman. The big kids won't let him join in their wintery fun. His Nana inspires a snowball fight that brings the entire neighborhood together. A snowy day mishap almost makes Peter forget how much fun he’s had. The whole community, along with Peter’s family and friends, come together to help Peter realize what makes a holiday special is sharing, caring, and being together.

Movies.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe
Movies.overview: Flash Gordon and his crew travel to planet Mongo seeking an antidote for the Purple Death. Ming the Merciless does his best to stop them.

Movies.title: Arthur Hailey's Detective
Movies.overview: Based on the bestseller by Arthur Hailey, a Catholic priest-turned-investigator for the police agrees to hear a convicted serial killer's confession.
